tools.name: PACX CLI
tools.summary: The PACX CLI itself — Dataverse and Power Platform management at your fingertips.

tools.name: PACX PowerShell Module
tools.summary: PowerShell module wrapping PACX CLI commands for script-based automation.

tools.name: Flow Studio MCP
tools.summary: MCP server for Flow Studio integration — browse, debug, govern, inspect, monitor, and run flows.

tools.name: Skill Pack Manager
tools.summary: Discover and install reusable skill packs for Dataverse and Power Platform automation.

tools.name: Copilot Studio MCP
tools.summary: MCP server for Copilot Studio agent lifecycle management.

tools.name: Fabric OneLake Tools
tools.summary: Microsoft Fabric and OneLake shortcuts, lakehouse management, and semantic model integration.

tools.name: Power BI Deployment Tools
tools.summary: Power BI workspace, dataset, and deployment pipeline management from the CLI.

tools.name: Microsoft 365 CLI Bridge
tools.summary: Bridge to Microsoft 365 CLI (CLI for Microsoft 365) for managing SharePoint, Teams, and Entra ID.

tools.name: NuGet Plugin Registry
tools.summary: Registry of NuGet packages that extend PACX with custom plugin commands.
